title: antirrhinum majus var. striatum
intro: Antirrhinum majus var. striatum, commonly known as the striped snapdragon, is a variety of the antirrhinum majus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the figwort family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to the presence of alkaloids such as antirrhinum alkaloids and gentianine. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to relieve symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
